# Fengyu WANG — Strategy, Investment & Software Portfolio

> Multilingual personal site of Fengyu WANG (Steve Wang). Based in Hong Kong. Three disciplines, one integrated perspective: market strategy, value investing, and software engineering.

## Key pages

- Home (English): /en/
- Home (简体中文): /zh-cn/
- Home (繁體中文): /zh-hk/
- Capabilities: /en/capabilities.html
- Market strategy cases: /en/mkt.html
- Investment research: /en/invest.html
- Software portfolio: /en/portfolio.html
- Blog: /en/blog/

## About

Fengyu WANG bridges market strategy, value investing, and software engineering. His work spans AI-assisted investment research workflows, cross-platform development (web, Android, Windows, automation), and data-driven market analysis. He writes about value investing, equity research, and engineering automation.

## Services

Three practice areas: Market Strategy & Cases (brand strategy, consumer insight, GTM planning), Investment Research & Valuation (value investing, business analysis, AI-assisted workflows), Engineering & Automation (cross-platform development, automation systems, AI-driven tools).

- Email: fengyuwang1@outlook.com

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/fengyuwang-com
